svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="User Registration" id="Md07MzhQ_YLtNMia1D9n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1147" dy="620" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="413" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-93" parent="1" style="shape=rect;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=center;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="User Registration System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="660" width="480" x="230" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-94" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="New User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="120" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-95" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Fill Registration Form" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="270" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-96" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Submit Registration
Form" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="270" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-97" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Validate Fields" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-98" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Check Email
Uniqueness" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-99" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Create Account &amp;
Store Password" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-100" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Assign Default
Viewer Role" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-101" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Handle Validation
Failure (Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-102" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Handle Duplicate
